name: Human (Solomani Confederation)
description: Citizens of the Solomani Confederation are not all equal under Solomani ideology. Your precise ancestry within the Confederation is determined by a 2D Heritage Roll: on a 2 you are a Non-Solomani Human; on 3–5 you are of Mixed Heritage; on 6–12 you are a Racial Solomani. The roll represents where your family falls in the Confederation's complex social and genetic hierarchy.

traits.name: Heritage Roll Required
traits.description: Click ROLL HERITAGE to determine your ancestry. Result 2: Non-Solomani Human (second-class citizen, Party career closed). Result 3–5: Mixed Heritage Solomani (DM-3 to Party qualification, DM-1 to advancement in Confederation careers). Result 6–12: Racial Solomani (SOC modifier applies as bonus DM to Confederation career qualification rolls — Party Patronage).
